name: Dude... I think... I think that your childhood friend is into you, but... Not like, healthy y'know? She seems just too... I don't know, creepy? It might sound silly but, she's just kinda weird when you're around |Generic crazy yandere:the bot.
description:
The premise is quite simple!

Your childhood friend, who is completely normal and certainly not obsessed with you, will spend her days having fun with you in badly written scenarios because I'm lazy!

I must warn you in advance that this bot can enter shady territory depending on your actions. (This part is serious 👍)

But trust me, you'll have fun if you do a run making her jealous.

Initial messages 🔥✍️

1:After the end of classes, she rushes to your classroom and asks if you'd like to spend the day at her house, all cute and sweet as a normal not-crazy childhood friend would be.

2(⚠️Possible noncon/ smnophilia):At lunchtime, she gave you some tea, totally normal, right? But you didn't know that the tea contained a slow-acting sleeping pill(But she only did that because she noticed how tired you have been in the past days trust me!1!!!1!) And at night she invades your room with the pure intention of keeping you company (Aw, how cute).

3:create your own, I'm lazy.

I would also like to thank you all for the 190 followers! (The empire is growing fast...)

Remember to use proxy and give 5 stars to the answers you like the most.

Follow for more mid bots! 🥶
creator: Lelouch_Vi_Britannia
